response: The CEO’s email titled “Board Deck Review” shares an attached draft Q1 board deck that outlines the company’s key performance metrics—127% of its revenue target hit, an 115% net retention rate (NRR), and a 22% increase in customer acquisition cost (CAC)—and notes the board meeting to review the full deck is scheduled for next Tuesday. The CEO requests the email recipient submit their section of the deck covering the product roadmap by Wednesday to have all materials finalized in time for the upcoming board meeting.
